headline: Texas Roadhouse: Optimistic Signs Abound, But Valuation Figures Leave Me Cautious
summary: Texas Roadhouse has surpassed Olive Garden to become the largest U.S. casual dining chain, outpacing industry trends. Read why TXRH stock is a hold.
